product: Automatic liquid clustering is now GA
tagline: Automatic liquid clustering is now generally available.
what_it_does: Automatic liquid clustering is now generally available. You can enable automatic liquid clustering on Unity Catalog managed tables. Automatic liquid clustering intelligently selects clustering keys to optimize data layout for your queries.
why_it_matters: It simplifies table management and optimizes query performance by automatically organizing data based on clustering keys.
plain_summary: Automatic liquid clustering is now generally available. You can enable automatic liquid clustering on Unity Catalog managed tables.
key_takeaway: Automatic liquid clustering is now generally available.
